articles.author: Rebecca Bellan
articles.title: Google releases three new Gemini models — but no 3.5 Pro - TechCrunch
articles.description: Google released Gemini 3.6 Flash, 3.5 Flash-Lite, and Flash Cyber, but the continued absence of Gemini 3.5 Pro raises fresh questions about its AI strategy.
articles.content: On Tuesday, Google DeepMind released Gemini 3.6 Flash, 3.5 Flash-Lite, and 3.5 Flash Cyber. Gemini 3.6 Flash is Googles workhorse model that promises improved capabilities in coding, knowledge work, … [+2088 chars]
